name: proc_creation_win_cmd_no_space_execution
raw_query: any where ((process.command_line like~ ("*cmd.exe/c*", "*\\cmd/c*", "*\"cmd/c*", "*cmd.exe/k*", "*\\cmd/k*", "*\"cmd/k*", "*cmd.exe/r*", "*\\cmd/r*", "*\"cmd/r*")) or (process.command_line like~ ("*/cwhoami*", "*/cpowershell*", "*/cschtasks*", "*/cbitsadmin*", "*/ccertutil*", "*/kwhoami*", "*/kpowershell*", "*/kschtasks*", "*/kbitsadmin*", "*/kcertutil*")) or (process.command_line like~ ("*cmd.exe /c*", "*cmd /c*", "*cmd.exe /k*", "*cmd /k*", "*cmd.exe /r*", "*cmd /r*"))) and (not ((process.command_line like~ ("*cmd.exe /c *", "*cmd /c *", "*cmd.exe /k *", "*cmd /k *", "*cmd.exe /r *", "*cmd /r *")) or (process.command_line like~ ("*AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Microsoft VS Code\\resources\\app\\node_modules*", "*cmd.exe/c .", "cmd.exe /c"))))
